{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Sales
Product Segment: Bread Improver (Baking Ingredients)
Reports To: Deputy Sales Head (Functional) / Deputy Business Head (Administrative)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven Business Development Executive with strong experience in the baking or flour industry.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving sales growth, acquiring new customers, and expanding relationships with existing clients within the B2B and B2C space.


Requirements


	Education: HND/BSc in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	Experience:
	
		3&ndash;5 years in business development or sales
		Mandatory experience in flour, baking, or food ingredient industry
	
	
	Strong understanding of B2B and B2C sales
	Proven track record of achieving sales targets
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Ability to work independently and travel frequently


What We&rsquo;re Looking For (Ideal Candidate):


	Experience working with bakeries, flour mills, or food manufacturing companies
	Strong industry network within the baking/food sector
	Willingness to travel and be mobile across regions.


Salary
N150,000 - N164,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruiter10@ascentech.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Executive Job at Ascentech Services Limited




        
    

        
        Ascentech Services Limited is a full-fledged Human Resource Solution Provider incorporated in 2013 with its Head Office in Lagos, Nigeria. We are committed to forging long-term partnerships with our clients by creating and delivering robust and flexible services that address the changing needs of their business.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive
Job Location: Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Sales
Product Segment: Bread Improver (Baking Ingredients)
Reports To: Deputy Sales Head (Functional) / Deputy Business Head (Administrative)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a results-driven Business Development Executive with strong experience in the baking or flour industry.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving sales growth, acquiring new customers, and expanding relationships with existing clients within the B2B and B2C space.


Requirements


	Education: HND/BSc in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	Experience:
	
		3–5 years in business development or sales
		Mandatory experience in flour, baking, or food ingredient industry
	
	
	Strong understanding of B2B and B2C sales
	Proven track record of achieving sales targets
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills
	Ability to work independently and travel frequently


What We’re Looking For (Ideal Candidate):


	Experience working with bakeries, flour mills, or food manufacturing companies
	Strong industry network within the baking/food sector
	Willingness to travel and be mobile across regions.


Salary
N150,000 - N164,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "HR-on-Wheels - Our client in the healthcare industry&nbsp;is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an Administrative Officer to support daily office operations and ensure efficient administrative processes.
	The role requires strong organisational, communication, and coordination skills to maintain smooth workflow, support internal teams, and contribute to excellent service delivery across healthcare operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage day-to-day administrative activities and office operations
	Maintain records, files, and documentation (physical and electronic)
	Handle correspondence, calls, and general inquiries professionally
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and appointments
	Support procurement, inventory tracking, and office supplies management
	Assist with report preparation and data entry
	Liaise with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure smooth operations
	Ensure compliance with organisational policies and administrative procedures.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Efficiency of office operations
	Accuracy and timeliness of documentation and reporting
	Responsiveness to internal and external requests
	Record management and organisation
	Support to team productivity and service delivery.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Business Administration or related field
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in an administrative role (preferably in healthcare or related sector)
	Strong organisational and multitasking skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of attention to detail and confidentiality.


Salary
N200,000 &ndash; N250,000 / month.",

Administrative Officer Job at HR-on-Wheels




        
    

        
        HR-on-Wheels - Our client in the healthcare industry is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an Administrative Officer to support daily office operations and ensure efficient administrative processes.
	The role requires strong organisational, communication, and coordination skills to maintain smooth workflow, support internal teams, and contribute to excellent service delivery across healthcare operations.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage day-to-day administrative activities and office operations
	Maintain records, files, and documentation (physical and electronic)
	Handle correspondence, calls, and general inquiries professionally
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and appointments
	Support procurement, inventory tracking, and office supplies management
	Assist with report preparation and data entry
	Liaise with internal teams and external stakeholders to ensure smooth operations
	Ensure compliance with organisational policies and administrative procedures.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Efficiency of office operations
	Accuracy and timeliness of documentation and reporting
	Responsiveness to internal and external requests
	Record management and organisation
	Support to team productivity and service delivery.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Business Administration or related field
	2–4 years of experience in an administrative role (preferably in healthcare or related sector)
	Strong organisational and multitasking skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of attention to detail and confidentiality.


Salary
N200,000 – N250,000 / month.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Credit Collection Officer",
  "description": "Comatrix Collection Service - We are a professional collection service provider that deals with helping various loan agencies in retrieving back their bad-loans as fast and effectively as possible. We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We build a professional team with experienced collectors for every loan agency, using SMS, calls, emails, various social media platforms to remind and encourage overdue customers to make repayments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Credit Collection Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abule Egba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Contact customers whose loan payments are overdue.
	Follow up with customers who have promised to pay on specific dates.
	Ensure accurate reporting of payments.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions.


Job Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE qualification.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Must own an android phone.
	Ability to call customers regarding overdue loan payments.
	Strong negation and persuasion skills.


Salary
N60,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to:&nbsp;hr@comatrix-collection.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more enquiries, contact:&nbsp;08073361160&nbsp;on&nbsp;Whatsapp.",

Credit Collection Officer Job at Comatrix Collection Service




        
    

        
        Comatrix Collection Service - We are a professional collection service provider that deals with helping various loan agencies in retrieving back their bad-loans as fast and effectively as possible. We make calls to customers to pay their outstanding debts, Send messages to customers, Guide customers through the payment process, Persuade reluctant customers to make payment promptly, Meet weekly and monthly targets, Give proper and correct report of work.

We build a professional team with experienced collectors for every loan agency, using SMS, calls, emails, various social media platforms to remind and encourage overdue customers to make repayments.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Credit Collection Officer

Job Location: Abule Egba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Contact customers whose loan payments are overdue.
	Follow up with customers who have promised to pay on specific dates.
	Ensure accurate reporting of payments.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions.


Job Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE qualification.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Must own an android phone.
	Ability to call customers regarding overdue loan payments.
	Strong negation and persuasion skills.


Salary
N60,000 - N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries, contact: 08073361160 on Whatsapp.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Ultraviolet Microfinance Bank is&nbsp;recruiting qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Loan Marketing / Disbursement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Description


	The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying potential clients, marketing loan products, and facilitating the loan application process.
	The role focuses on achieving loan disbursement targets while ensuring compliance with credit policies and maintaining high-quality loan portfolios.


Responsibilities


	Market and promote the Bank&rsquo;s loan products to individuals and businesses
	Identify and generate leads for new loan opportunities
	Assess clients&rsquo; financial needs and recommend suitable loan products
	Guide clients through the loan application and documentation process
	Conduct preliminary credit assessments and risk evaluations
	Follow up on loan applications to ensure timely approval and disbursement
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to encourage repeat business
	Monitor loan repayments and support recovery efforts when necessary
	Ensure compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements
	Maintain accurate records of all marketing and loan activities.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@ultravioletmfb.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Loan Marketing / Disbursement Officer Job at Ultraviolet Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Ultraviolet Microfinance Bank is recruiting qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

Job Position: Loan Marketing / Disbursement Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Description


	The successful candidate will be responsible for identifying potential clients, marketing loan products, and facilitating the loan application process.
	The role focuses on achieving loan disbursement targets while ensuring compliance with credit policies and maintaining high-quality loan portfolios.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Market and promote the Bank’s loan products to individuals and businesses
	Identify and generate leads for new loan opportunities
	Assess clients’ financial needs and recommend suitable loan products
	Guide clients through the loan application and documentation process
	Conduct preliminary credit assessments and risk evaluations
	Follow up on loan applications to ensure timely approval and disbursement
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients to encourage repeat business
	Monitor loan repayments and support recovery efforts when necessary
	Ensure compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements
	Maintain accurate records of all marketing and loan activities.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Supervisor",
  "description": "Newedge Finance Limited is an a financial service company that focuses on inclusive personal lending available to erstwhile excluded members of the society in Nigeria. The company uses financial research to drive its product to all strata of society and is assisted by an in-house effective risk responsibility analysis to make recommendations for financial performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Supervisor
Job Locations:&nbsp;Kaduna and Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Supervise day-to-day HR activities and ensure smooth workflow
	Maintain and update employee records and HR databases
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
	Monitor attendance, leave management, and staff records
	Coordinate recruitment processes (job postings, screening, interviews)
	Support hiring managers in selecting qualified candidates
	Oversee onboarding and orientation for new employees
	Handle employee complaints, grievances, and disciplinary matters
	Supervise and guide HR officers/assistants
	Prepare HR reports (headcount, turnover, etc.)
	Ensure compliance with local labor laws and internal policies
	Support audits and HR documentation reviews.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field, CIPM is an adanvatge
	3&ndash;6 years of HR experience (with at least 1&ndash;2 years in a supervisory role)
	Strong knowledge of HR practices and labor laws
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong leadership and team management ability
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR software.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified andidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;damola.olatide@newedgefinance.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;HR Application &ndash; Preferred Location (Kano / Kaduna)&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

HR Supervisor Job at Newedge Finance Limited




        
    

        
        Newedge Finance Limited is an a financial service company that focuses on inclusive personal lending available to erstwhile excluded members of the society in Nigeria. The company uses financial research to drive its product to all strata of society and is assisted by an in-house effective risk responsibility analysis to make recommendations for financial performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Supervisor
Job Locations: Kaduna and Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Supervise day-to-day HR activities and ensure smooth workflow
	Maintain and update employee records and HR databases
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies
	Monitor attendance, leave management, and staff records
	Coordinate recruitment processes (job postings, screening, interviews)
	Support hiring managers in selecting qualified candidates
	Oversee onboarding and orientation for new employees
	Handle employee complaints, grievances, and disciplinary matters
	Supervise and guide HR officers/assistants
	Prepare HR reports (headcount, turnover, etc.)
	Ensure compliance with local labor laws and internal policies
	Support audits and HR documentation reviews.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field, CIPM is an adanvatge
	3–6 years of HR experience (with at least 1–2 years in a supervisory role)
	Strong knowledge of HR practices and labor laws
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong leadership and team management ability
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and HR software.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified andidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “HR Application – Preferred Location (Kano / Kaduna)” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
